# Apnipathshala Tech Ecosystem

> A connected suite of software products designed to support digital literacy,
> self-directed learning, student growth, and community-based education in India.

Apnipathshala is a social-impact startup that builds technology for Community Learning Centres (CLCs).
The ecosystem places the **student at the centre** and connects every platform to serve one mission:
*empower every student to learn, grow, and lead.*

---

## What is this site?

This page explains the **Apnipathshala Tech Ecosystem** — how each software product works,
how they connect with each other, and what outcomes they create for students, pod leaders,
and community educators.

**Audience:** Students, community leaders, pod leaders, education partners, internal team members,
and anyone exploring the ecosystem for the first time.

---

## Core Products

- [Apnipathshala](https://www.apnipathshala.org/) — Social-impact startup platform for building digital literacy classrooms. Live.
- [Teach To Earn](https://www.teachtoearn.in/) — Franchisee model for digital literacy classrooms; supports a sustainable CLC network. Live.
- [Apna PC](https://www.apnapc.com/) — Distraction-free, education-focused computer built with study tools and safety features. Live.
- [Apniprerna](https://www.apniprerna.com/) — CLC management software for monitoring student activity, computer health, and parent insights. Live.
- [Eklavya](https://www.eklavya.io/) — Free AI tutor for JEE, NEET, CBSE, and Maharashtra Board. Live.
- [PMS / VED](https://pms.apnipathshala.org/) — Program Management System; centralised CLC hub for students, fees, computers, and data. Live.
- **Shiksha OS** — India's first education-focused operating system for safe self-directed learning. Coming Soon.
- **LMS / DHRONA** — Hyper-niche curriculum LMS with AI-personalized assessment and self-improvement loops. Coming Soon.

---

## How the Ecosystem Connects

All products share data through a **Unified Data Layer** with centralised authentication (single sign-on).
Key integration points:

- **PMS ↔ Apniprerna** — Lifecycle data, student sync, weekly report submission, auto complaint creation.
- **Shiksha OS → Apniprerna** — Attendance (login data), learning & usage data, device activity.
- **Apna Dashboard ↔ PMS / Apniprerna** — KPIs, graphs, inventory/CMD, finance management.
- **LMS ↔ PMS / Apniprerna** — Assessment submissions used for weekly reports; curriculum access for CLC/POD leaders.

Cross-cutting capabilities across all platforms:
- Centralised Authentication (SSO)
- Unified Data Layer (real-time sync)
- Smart Notifications (parents, POD leaders, admins)
- AI & Insights (predictions, recommendations)
- Reports (real-time and custom)

---

## Student Outcomes

1. Personalised Learning Journey
2. Safe & Distraction-Free Environment
3. Track Progress & Improve Continuously
4. Guidance, Support & Community
5. Build Skills & Real Knowledge
6. Better Opportunities for a Brighter Future

## About

**Organisation:** Apnipathshala  
**Type:** Social-impact education technology startup, India  
**Mission:** Empower every student in underserved communities to learn, grow, and lead through technology.  
**Tone:** Professional, clear, inspiring, community-first.
